'''[[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]]''' '''Oron''' was a professor of [[Archaeology/Legends|archaeology]] on the planet [[Jandoon]]. He was sold a communications base on [[Delari Prime]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He had a daughter named [[Meela]].

{{Char-stub}}
